records.question: What locations are in Boston with the office phone number (617)123-4444 and the zipcode 2190?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT location.locationid FROM location
WHERE location.locationcity = 'Boston' AND location.officephone = '(617)123-4444' AND location.zipcode = 2190
records.pred_sql: SELECT location.locationID FROM location WHERE location.locationcity = 'Boston' AND location.officephone = '(617)123-4444' AND location.zipcode = 2190

records.question: What locations have female managers hired exactly on 5/14/84 and with a zipcode of at least 60620?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT location.locationid FROM location
JOIN employee ON location.locationid = employee.locationid
JOIN position ON employee.positionid = position.positionid
WHERE position.positiontitle = 'Manager' AND employee.gender = 'F' AND location.zipcode >= 60620 AND employee.hiredate = '5/14/84'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT location.locationID
FROM location
JOIN employee ON location.locationID = employee.locationID
JOIN position ON employee.positionID = position.positionID
WHERE employee.gender = 'Female'
AND position.positiontitle LIKE '%Manager%'
AND employee.hiredate = '5/14/84'
AND location.zipcode >= 60620

records.question: Which locations in New York City at 1650 Washington Blvd have a zipcode of at most 15648 and employ male staff hired on 7/16/98 with a Good performance rating?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT location.locationid FROM location
JOIN employee ON location.locationid = employee.locationid
WHERE location.zipcode <= 15648 AND location.locationcity = 'New York City' AND employee.hiredate = '7/16/98' AND location.address = '1650 Washington Blvd' AND employee.gender = 'M' AND employee.performance = 'Good'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT location.locationID
FROM location
JOIN employee ON location.locationID = employee.locationID
WHERE location.locationcity = 'New York City'
AND location.address = '1650 Washington Blvd'
AND location.zipcode <= 15648
AND employee.gender = 'male'
AND employee.hiredate = '7/16/98'
AND employee.performance = 'Good'

records.question: What locations in Chicago with the address 500 Loop Highway and zipcode 60620 have an employee named Mary Smith hired on 1/1/06 whose performance is exactly Average?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT location.locationid FROM location
JOIN employee ON location.locationid = employee.locationid
JOIN position ON employee.positionid = position.positionid
WHERE location.locationcity = 'Chicago' AND employee.lastname = 'Smith' AND location.address = '500 Loop Highway' AND location.zipcode = 60620 AND employee.hiredate = '1/1/06' AND employee.firstname = 'Mary' AND employee.performance = 'Average'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT location.locationID
FROM location
JOIN employee ON location.locationID = employee.locationID
WHERE location.locationcity = 'Chicago'
AND location.address = '500 Loop Highway'
AND location.zipcode = 60620
AND employee.firstname = 'Mary'
AND employee.lastname = 'Smith'
AND employee.hiredate = '1/1/06'
AND employee.performance = 'Average'

records.question: Which locations in Illinois have female employees?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT location.locationid FROM location
JOIN employee ON location.locationid = employee.locationid
JOIN position ON employee.positionid = position.positionid
WHERE employee.gender = 'F' AND location.state = 'IL'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT location.locationID
FROM location
JOIN employee ON location.locationID = employee.locationID
WHERE location.state = 'Illinois' AND employee.gender = 'Female'
